meaning: 沃州[瑞士州名](即瓦特州
examples: The design of the new school complex is marked by the alternating use of lateral facades crowned by high roofs and pitched facades reminiscent of the typical features of large Vaud farmhouses.
As usual, the Euro-enthusiastic French-speakers, who account for only 17% of Swiss citizens, were keen: 80% of the canton of Vaud, next to Lake Geneva, for example, backed the deal.
